name: Chris P.
current_location: New York, New York, United States
education: Bachelor of Science - BS, Computer Science from The College of New Jersey
jobTitle: Senior Software Engineer - Hybrid Cloud Infrastructure
headline: Senior Software Engineer | Large-scale Linux Environments | Enterprise Infrastructure Optimization
about:
Technology has always fascinated me, especially its impact on daily life. As a result, I have over ten years of experience in the technical field. I specialize in deploying and optimizing Linux-based systems for large-scale environments.

At Microsoft, I manage 15,000 physical and virtual Linux hosts. They span six global colocation sites, ensuring seamless operations at scale.

I hold a Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science from The College of New Jersey. Each role in my career has deepened my expertise in systems engineering.

At PlaceIQ, I managed a 700-node Hadoop cluster. Through this, I learned how to improve efficiency and performance.

One career highlight was my time at Nomura. Here I led coordination efforts during major incidents. By analyzing metrics, my team prevented issues that could have cost the company over $1M. This effort highlighted the value of teamwork and communication.

Outside of work, I explore new technologies, from enterprise solutions to open-source projects. I stay updated with industry trends and share my knowledge through informal mentoring.

If you'd like to discuss further or collaborate on projects, feel free to send me a message. I’m always excited to connect with fellow tech enthusiasts!

Skills: Linux System Administration | Infrastructure Management | Performance Optimization | Monitoring Tools (Nagios, Grafana) | Cloud Technologies | Data Center Operations

Skills: Linux System Administration | Infrastructure Management | Performance Optimization | Monitoring Tools (Nagios, Grafana) | Cloud Technologies | Data Center Operations

currentPositions.description:
- Launch and monitor approx. 15,000 physical/virtual Linux hosts in six global colocation sites
- Optimize platform operational oversight leveraging both Nagios and Grafana resulting in enhanced visibility into system inefficiencies while achieving a significant decrease in production outages
- Direct the administration and deployment of five production storage clusters across three continents, ensuring optimal availability and performance for NFS shared datastores
- Collaborate with and mentor a global Operations team of 50 operating across the US, EMEA, and APAC regions, establishing effective communication channels that enhance project delivery
- Orchestrate critical improvements in data operations through three strategic migrations of outdated OS environments, executing standardized processes that decrease major incident volume
currentPositions.title: Senior Software Engineer - Hybrid Cloud Infrastructure

experiences.title: Senior Software Engineer - Hybrid Cloud Infrastructure
experiences.jobDescription:
- Launch and monitor approx. 15,000 physical/virtual Linux hosts in six global colocation sites
- Optimize platform operational oversight leveraging both Nagios and Grafana resulting in enhanced visibility into system inefficiencies while achieving a significant decrease in production outages
- Direct the administration and deployment of five production storage clusters across three continents, ensuring optimal availability and performance for NFS shared datastores
- Collaborate with and mentor a global Operations team of 50 operating across the US, EMEA, and APAC regions, establishing effective communication channels that enhance project delivery
- Orchestrate critical improvements in data operations through three strategic migrations of outdated OS environments, executing standardized processes that decrease major incident volume
experiences.jobLocation: New York, New York, United States

experiences.title: System Administrator II - Big Data Operations
experiences.jobDescription:
- Implemented management strategies for a large estate of hosts in a dual location environment
- Maintained, upgraded, and monitored approx. 700 nodes in a large Hadoop cluster deployment, optimizing for maximum job performance
- Developed custom server deployments using Kickstart, enforced configurations with Puppet, implemented Ansible for task automation, achieving 30% faster deployments
- Coordinated manual and automated external client data upload/download via SFTP, S3, and secure physical removable media, communicating with outside customers for delivery
- Performed datacenter tasks including host and switch installation and cabling, including spearheading a full datacenter migration project resulting in a 50% reduction in operational costs
experiences.jobLocation: New York, New York, United States

experiences.title: System Administrator - Backups and Storage
experiences.jobDescription:
-	Installed and maintained physical/virtual Unix hosts, including Solaris and Linux platforms
-	Administered and upgraded 8 NAS/SAN NetApp appliance clusters and Brocade switches
-	Configured external SMTP gateways to provide successful delivery of legitimate messages and quarantine of malicious messages, with daily volumes of 100,000+ emails
-	Managed internal backup servers, running Commvault software on Windows Server 2012/2016, as well as tape libraries and 1,000+ tapes for archiving
-	Processed requests for backups and restores for approx. 2,300 internal users and groups
experiences.jobLocation: Tinton Falls, New Jersey, United States

experiences.title: Senior Technical Operations Analyst - Global Monitoring
experiences.jobDescription:
- Coordinated mitigation efforts among specialized technical teams during large scale incidents
- Analyzed metrics data over time with the objective of eliminating chronic problems and preventing future issues that would otherwise result in $1M+ of lost revenue
- Led the global organization in troubleshooting and resolving issues with the regional infrastructure platforms, becoming a team supervisor for a US group of approx. 20 analysts
- Aggregated events from System Sentinel, SMARTS, HPSIM to form a more complete picture of the overall infrastructural health, consolidating 3,000+ events per day into easily to parsed views
- Employed Splunk to investigate alerting incidents while developing visual dashboards to represent critical metrics, findings directly contributing to identifying system vulnerabilities
experiences.jobLocation: New York, New York, United States

experiences.title: Data Center Hardware Engineer - Financial Data Infrastructure
experiences.jobDescription:
- Installed, configured, and upgraded servers, in addition to mapping out and connecting all LAN and SAN networks
- Coordinated with the System Administrator and Network Design groups to provide technical support on all equipment in a 24/7 environment
- Planned equipment installation while taking into consideration the power and thermal requirements
- Configured network equipment based on the needs of the attached hardware
- Analyzed logs within the OS and onboard hardware management to investigate and repair machine errors

experiences.title: Technical Analyst - Wealth Management Remote Support
experiences.jobDescription:
- Guided local and international branch staff, financial advisors, and corporate employees
- Facilitated all aspects of technical daily tasks via phone and remote access
- Coordinated with users on configuration and troubleshooting of specialized desktop/mobile hardware and software
- Advised in hardware configuration and line management of Cisco VoIP telephony in corporate offices

educations.title: The College of New Jersey
educations.subtitle: Bachelor of Science - BS, Computer Science
